/usr/bin/ar qc librrc_nr_special.a CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/sys_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/Modulized_HIBFSS_Schnorr2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/Dilithium.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/CKG.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/AMF_T_BORG.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/BSs_T_BORG.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/AMF_EC_SCHNORR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/BS_EC_SCHNORR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/AMF_HIBS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/BS_HIBS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/AMF_ECDSA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/BS_ECDSA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rrc_nr_special.dir/crypto_utils.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib librrc_nr_special.a
